items.title:
$SPACZZX.P $RKLB $RDW $SPY Space based data centers is a very stupid idea. Maintenance would not be practical. If they blow a fuse on something they would need to send an astronut up there on a rocket to replace it.  
  
It is a hyper expensive solution to a problem that does not exists.
items.author: BaconGreez

$META Hi guys,

I have a question. I was looking at the 6/5 tick-by-tick tape and noticed several large orders at $593.00. I believe that approximately 6–8 million shares were bought at that price.

My question is: why?

I’ve attached a screenshot showing a 1 million-share purchase at $593.00.

Than

items.body: Cullinan Therapeutics announced positive Phase 1 clinical data for CLN-978, a CD19xCD3 T cell engager, showing clinical benefit including remissions in both systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) and rheumatoid arthritis (RA) patients following single target doses. items.title: SpaceX Stock Could Soar to $5 Trillion on IPO Day, According to a Wall Street Expert
items.body: SpaceX is set to IPO on June 12 at $135/share with a $1.77 trillion valuation. CNBC's Jim Cramer predicts the stock could reach $5 trillion (180% upside) due to massive demand and limited float. However, the IPO could pressure the broader market as investors sell other stocks to raise capital. Long-

items.title: Social media bans on teens risk strengthening Big Tech's grip on the sector, Bluesky exec warns

items.title: Why LinkedIn Founder Reid Hoffman Is Leaving Microsoft's Board After Nearly A Decade
items.body:
Reid Hoffman, who co-founded LinkedIn in 2002, is stepping down from Microsoft‘s (NASDAQ:MSFT) board of directors to refocus on Manus, his AI-powered drug discovery startup, the company announced Thursday.



LinkedIn Founder Returns to Startup Roots



Hoffman joined the MSFT board in 2016 following the company’s $26.2 billion LinkedIn acquisition. During his tenure, he was present fo

items.title: Warren Buffett disciple Guy Spier built career on value investing. A rare cancer changed everything
